Sannel.Encoding.Manager

Class HandBrakeOptions

Namespace
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake
Assembly
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake.dll

Configuration options for HandBrake CLI integration. Bound from the "HandBrake" section in appsettings.json.

public class HandBrakeOptions
Inheritance
object
HandBrakeOptions

object.ToString()

Properties

ContentRootPath

Application content root path used to resolve relative ScanOutputPath. Set during DI registration (e.g. from IWebHostEnvironment.ContentRootPath).

public string ContentRootPath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ExecutablePath

Path to the HandBrakeCLI executable. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH.

public string ExecutablePath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

MinimumVersion

Minimum acceptable HandBrakeCLI version. Parsed as System.Version.

public string MinimumVersion { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ScanOutputPath

Directory where scan result JSON files are written. Relative paths are resolved relative to the app's content root.

public string ScanOutputPath { get; set; }

Property Value

string
